---
title: "Face detection updated code (Brittleness Check)"
author: Shreya Shetty
format: html
editor: visual
---

### Final Shreya R Code (Brittleness by Variable)

**STEP 1: THE SHARED SETUP (Everyone runs this first)**

```{r}
library(magick)
library(image.libfacedetection)

# Set Working Directory
setwd("~/Documents/Spring 2026 Courses/DS for Public Policy/face_detection")

# Function to extract highest AI confidence
get_max_confidences <- function(folder_path, sample_size = 80) {
  image_files <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "\\.jpg$|\\.jpeg$")
  image_files <- image_files[!is.na(image_files)]
  if(length(image_files) == 0) return(c())
  
  actual_sample <- min(sample_size, length(image_files))
  sampled_files <- sample(image_files, actual_sample)
  max_confs <- numeric(actual_sample)
  
  for (i in 1:actual_sample) {
    img <- tryCatch(image_read(sampled_files[i]), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(img)) {
      faces <- image_detect_faces(img)
      if (length(faces$detections$confidence) > 0) {
        max_confs[i] <- max(faces$detections$confidence, na.rm = TRUE)
      } else {
        max_confs[i] <- 0 
      }
    }
  }
  return(max_confs)
}

# Function to calculate Detection Rate and 95% Confidence Interval
calc_stats <- function(conf_vector, threshold) {
  n <- length(conf_vector)
  successes <- sum(conf_vector >= threshold)
  p <- successes / n
  margin_error <- 1.96 * sqrt((p * (1 - p)) / n)
  lower_bound <- max(0, (p - margin_error) * 100)
  upper_bound <- min(100, (p + margin_error) * 100)
  return(list(rate = p * 100, lower = lower_bound, upper = upper_bound))
}

# The thresholds we want to test
thresholds <- c(50, 60, 70, 80, 90)
```

STEP 2: PERSON 1 - SCALE (Crowds & Distance)

```{r}
print("Scanning Scale Categories...")
data_parade <- get_max_confidences("WIDER_train/images//0--Parade")             # Hard
data_stock  <- get_max_confidences("WIDER_train/images//15--Stock_Market")      # Medium
data_student <- get_max_confidences("WIDER_train/images//29--Students_Schoolkids") # Easy

# Calculate Stats
rate_parade <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_parade, t)$rate)
low_parade <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_parade, t)$lower)
up_parade <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_parade, t)$upper)

rate_stock <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_stock, t)$rate)
low_stock <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_stock, t)$lower)
up_stock <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_stock, t)$upper)

rate_student <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_student, t)$rate)
low_student <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_student, t)$lower)
up_student <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_student, t)$upper)

# Plot
plot(thresholds, rate_student, type="o", col="darkgreen", pch=16, ylim=c(0, 100), lwd=2,
     main="Algorithm Brittleness: Scale (Crowds)", xlab="Confidence Threshold", ylab="Detection Rate (%)", las=1)
lines(thresholds, rate_stock, type="o", col="orange", pch=16, lwd=2)
lines(thresholds, rate_parade, type="o", col="darkred", pch=16, lwd=2)

arrows(thresholds, low_student, thresholds, up_student, length=0.05, angle=90, code=3, col="darkgreen")
arrows(thresholds, low_stock, thresholds, up_stock, length=0.05, angle=90, code=3, col="orange")
arrows(thresholds, low_parade, thresholds, up_parade, length=0.05, angle=90, code=3, col="darkred")

legend("bottomleft", legend=c("Students (Close-up/Easy)", "Stock Market (Medium)", "Parade (Extreme Crowd)"), 
       col=c("darkgreen", "orange", "darkred"), lty=1, pch=16, lwd=2)
```

STEP 3: PERSON 2 - OCCLUSION (Obstructions & Masks)

```{r}
print("Scanning Occlusion Categories...")
data_riot <- get_max_confidences("WIDER_train/images//3--Riot")               # Hard
data_racing <- get_max_confidences("WIDER_train/images//42--Car_Racing")      # Medium
data_interview <- get_max_confidences("WIDER_train/images//13--Interview")    # Easy

# Calculate Stats
rate_riot <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_riot, t)$rate)
low_riot <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_riot, t)$lower)
up_riot <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_riot, t)$upper)

rate_racing <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_racing, t)$rate)
low_racing <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_racing, t)$lower)
up_racing <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_racing, t)$upper)

rate_interview <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_interview, t)$rate)
low_interview <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_interview, t)$lower)
up_interview <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_interview, t)$upper)

# Plot
plot(thresholds, rate_interview, type="o", col="darkgreen", pch=16, ylim=c(0, 100), lwd=2,
     main="Algorithm Brittleness: Occlusion (Masks/Helmets)", xlab="Confidence Threshold", ylab="Detection Rate (%)", las=1)
lines(thresholds, rate_racing, type="o", col="orange", pch=16, lwd=2)
lines(thresholds, rate_riot, type="o", col="darkred", pch=16, lwd=2)

arrows(thresholds, low_interview, thresholds, up_interview, length=0.05, angle=90, code=3, col="darkgreen")
arrows(thresholds, low_racing, thresholds, up_racing, length=0.05, angle=90, code=3, col="orange")
arrows(thresholds, low_riot, thresholds, up_riot, length=0.05, angle=90, code=3, col="darkred")

legend("bottomleft", legend=c("Interview (Clear/Easy)", "Racing (Partial/Medium)", "Riot (Heavy/Hard)"), 
       col=c("darkgreen", "orange", "darkred"), lty=1, pch=16, lwd=2)
```

STEP 4: PERSON 3 - POSE (Movement & Angles)

```{r}
print("Scanning Pose Categories...")
data_gym <- get_max_confidences("WIDER_train/images//40--Gymnastics")            # Hard
data_dance <- get_max_confidences("WIDER_train/images//4--Dancing")              # Medium
data_press <- get_max_confidences("WIDER_train/images//9--Press_Conference")     # Easy

# Calculate Stats
rate_gym <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_gym, t)$rate)
low_gym <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_gym, t)$lower)
up_gym <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_gym, t)$upper)

rate_dance <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_dance, t)$rate)
low_dance <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_dance, t)$lower)
up_dance <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_dance, t)$upper)

rate_press <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_press, t)$rate)
low_press <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_press, t)$lower)
up_press <- sapply(thresholds, function(t) calc_stats(data_press, t)$upper)

# Plot
plot(thresholds, rate_press, type="o", col="darkgreen", pch=16, ylim=c(0, 100), lwd=2,
     main="Algorithm Brittleness: Pose (Movement)", xlab="Confidence Threshold", ylab="Detection Rate (%)", las=1)
lines(thresholds, rate_dance, type="o", col="orange", pch=16, lwd=2)
lines(thresholds, rate_gym, type="o", col="darkred", pch=16, lwd=2)

arrows(thresholds, low_press, thresholds, up_press, length=0.05, angle=90, code=3, col="darkgreen")
arrows(thresholds, low_dance, thresholds, up_dance, length=0.05, angle=90, code=3, col="orange")
arrows(thresholds, low_gym, thresholds, up_gym, length=0.05, angle=90, code=3, col="darkred")

legend("bottomleft", legend=c("Press Conf (Static/Easy)", "Dancing (Mixed/Medium)", "Gymnastics (Erratic/Hard)"), 
       col=c("darkgreen", "orange", "darkred"), lty=1, pch=16, lwd=2)
```
